2026-04-20T18:43:50.3481745Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3482317Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3482750Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3483127Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3483442Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3483682Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3483852Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3484036Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3484214Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3484447Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3484657Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3484955Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3485234Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3485447Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T18:43:50.3485720Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m
